title: Macrobiotic Roasted Turkish Ground Oats Lahmacun
description: A macrobiotic-friendly twist on the traditional Turkish dish, featuring roasted ground oats and a blend of savory spices, perfect for a brunch gathering

ingredients.name: ground oats
ingredients.notes: rolled or steel-cut oats blended into a coarse flour

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, combine the ground oats, chopped onion, chopped red bell pepper, tomato paste, olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper, and mix well
Divide the mixture into 4-6 equal portions, depending on desired size, and shape each portion into a thin circle
Place the circles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
Roast the lahmacun in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned and the centers are set
Remove the lahmacun from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley
Serve the lahmacun hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired
